title: New Customer Product Inquiry
description: Potential customer calling to learn about TechFlow's features and pricing before signing up.

turns.caller: Hi there. I'm evaluating project management tools for my team of about 25 people. Can you tell me what TechFlow offers?
That sounds interesting. What would pricing look like for a team of 25?
We're currently using Jira. Does TechFlow integrate with it? We can't do a full migration right away.
Good to know. What about data security? We're in healthcare so compliance matters a lot to us.
Can we start with a trial? And can you send me more information about the Enterprise plan?
Great, I'll check it out. Thanks for your time.
